steps.title: Convert changes to multipliers
steps.content: An increase of $165\%$ means multiply by $2.65$. A decrease of $18\%$ means multiply by $0.82$.

steps.title: Compute the net increase
steps.content:
Apply the multipliers in sequence:
$$2.65(0.82)=2.173$$
This is an increase of:
$$(2.173-1)(100\%)=117.30\%$$
The answer is A.
